race.comment: The $50,000 Belle Of Capricornia. BLACK EYED BLONDE (7) is an honest commodity who has only missed the top five once in 11 career efforts and doesn't know how to run a bad race. Has only missed a drum once in four attempts over this distance range and will be rock-hard fit for this fourth run back from the spell. Plenty to like about her prospects. JAM PACKED (3) was a touch disappointing last time out but the three runs prior to start the campaign were full of merit. Can bounce back without surprising. TRAPEDO (4) doesn't win out of turn but is usually thereabouts and looks one for the exotics players. INNOVADER (9) boasts a victory around this circuit and strips fitter third-up from the break. Don't underestimate. TIGON PRINCESS (6) next in line with Wiggins on board.
